title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into Contract for Service of Mr. Marlon H. Nabia As a Para-teacher (LEARNING SUPPORT AIDE) with Corresponding Monthly Compensation of Fifteen Thousand Pesos (P 15,000.00) Chargeable Against the Special Education Fund Effective January 1 to 31, 2023. Councilwoman Leren Mae M. Bautista 02/06/2023
